title: ephedra × eleutherolepis
intro: Ephedra × eleutherolepis is a hybrid plant species obtained from the cross between Ephedra sinica and Ephedra intermedia, known for its medicinal properties. The plant contains ephedrine alkaloids, which have been used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to their bronchodilatory effects. In herbal medicine, ephedra × eleutherolepis is valued for its ability to improve circulation, reduce fatigue, and enhance mental clarity, leading to overall improved physical and mental well-being. The plant is often used in traditional Chinese medicine and can be prepared into various herbal products, including capsules, tablets, and teas.
